prompt: Cinematic editorial close-up of an elegant young woman with a tousled chin-length brunette bob, a few soft waves falling over one eye, radiant natural makeup, luminous glossy lips, and expressive emotional gaze. Moody indoor setting with rich amber and honey-toned color grading, intimate luxury fashion-magazine atmosphere, shallow depth of field, creamy background bokeh, and subtle film grain. Captured with an 85mm portrait lens at f/1.4 for dreamy focus falloff and ultra-realistic skin texture. Soft window light streaks, cozy cinematic mood, high-contrast lighting, refined editorial styling, photorealistic 8K detail, timeless Kodak Portra-inspired film aesthetic.
